effect_by_rank.1: Gain 3% damage per 30 ammo spent. Max 10 stacks. All stacks lost on reload or weapon swap.
effect_by_rank.2: Gain 6% damage per 30 ammo spent. Max 10 stacks.
effect_by_rank.3: Gain 9% damage per 30 ammo spent. Max 10 stacks.

effect_by_rank.1: Your Bullet Storm stack limit is doubled.
Heavy weapons weigh 30% less. +5% bash damage per Bullet Storm stack.
effect_by_rank.2: Heavy weapons weigh 60% less. +5% bash damage per Bullet Storm stack.
effect_by_rank.3: Heavy weapons weigh 90% less. +5% bash damage per Bullet Storm stack.

effect_by_rank.1: Keep 50% of your Bullet Storm stacks when you reload. +1% reload speed per stack.
effect_by_rank.2: Keep 50% of your Bullet Storm stacks when you reload. +2% reload speed per stack.
effect_by_rank.3: Keep 50% of your Bullet Storm stacks when you reload. +3% reload speed per stack.

effect_by_rank.1: Big guns gain 10% accuracy. Doubled while in Power Armor.
effect_by_rank.2: Big guns gain 20% accuracy. Doubled while in Power Armor.
effect_by_rank.3: Big guns gain 30% accuracy. Doubled while in Power Armor.

effect_by_rank.1: Shotguns weigh 30% less and reload 10% faster.
effect_by_rank.2: Shotguns weigh 60% less and reload 20% faster.
effect_by_rank.3: Shotguns weigh 90% less and reload 30% faster.

effect_by_rank.1: Shotguns gain a 10% increase in hip-fire accuracy.
effect_by_rank.2: Shotguns gain a 20% increase in hip-fire accuracy.
effect_by_rank.3: Shotguns gain a 30% increase in hip-fire accuracy.

effect_by_rank.1: Your fists deal more damage based on your Damage Resistance.
effect_by_rank.2: Your fists deal more damage based on your Damage Resistance.
effect_by_rank.3: Your fists deal more damage based on your Damage Resistance.

effect_by_rank.1: Your melee weapons do +10% damage to crippled targets.
effect_by_rank.2: Your melee weapons do +20% damage to crippled targets.
effect_by_rank.3: Your melee weapons do +30% damage to crippled targets.

effect_by_rank.1: Melee weapons deal +50% limb damage. (No Power Tools)
Melee weapons deal +25% power attack damage. (No Power Tools)
While equipping a melee weapon, reduce incoming stagger by 25%.
Your bleed effects deal 35% more damage with 25% less duration.
Your melee weapons ignore 25% of your target's armor.
effect_by_rank.2: Your melee weapons ignore 50% of your target's armor.
effect_by_rank.3: Your melee weapons ignore 75% of your target's armor.

effect_by_rank.1: Your melee weapons weigh 20% less and you can swing them 10% faster.
effect_by_rank.2: Your melee weapons weigh 40% less and you can swing them 20% faster.
effect_by_rank.3: Your melee weapons weigh 60% less and you can swing them 30% faster.

effect_by_rank.1: VATS targets limbs. Focus fire to gain accuracy and damage per shot.
effect_by_rank.2: VATS targets limbs. Focus fire to gain more accuracy and damage per shot.
effect_by_rank.3: VATS targets limbs. Focus fire to gain high accuracy and damage per shot.

effect_by_rank.1: VATS swaps targets on kill with +10% damage to your next target.
effect_by_rank.2: VATS swaps targets on kill with +10% and +20% damage to your next targets.
effect_by_rank.3: VATS swaps targets on kill with +10%, +20%, and +30% damage to your next targets.

effect_by_rank.1: Gain +6% damage per kill (60% max) for 30 seconds. Refreshes on kill.
effect_by_rank.2: Gain +12% damage per kill (60% max) for 30 seconds. Refreshes on kill.
effect_by_rank.3: Gain +18% damage per kill (60% max) for 30 seconds. Refreshes on kill.

effect_by_rank.1: Critical hits consume 85% of your critical meter.
effect_by_rank.2: Critical hits consume 70% of your critical meter.
effect_by_rank.3: Critical hits consume 55% of your critical meter.

effect_by_rank.1: Hits outside V.A.T.S. refill your Critical Meter at 10% contribution.
Any kill in V.A.T.S. restores Action Points based on your Luck.
Heavy guns gain a 4% stagger chance and a 4% chance to cripple a limb.
effect_by_rank.2: Heavy guns gain an 8% stagger chance and an 8% chance to cripple a limb.
effect_by_rank.3: Heavy guns gain a 12% stagger chance and a 12% chance to cripple a limb.

effect_by_rank.1: Gain a 6% chance to deflect ranged enemy damage.
effect_by_rank.2: Gain a 12% chance to deflect ranged enemy damage.
effect_by_rank.3: Gain an 18% chance to deflect ranged enemy damage.

effect_by_rank.1: Negative effects of mutations are reduced by 25%.
effect_by_rank.2: Negative effects of mutations are reduced by 50%.
effect_by_rank.3: Negative effects of mutations are reduced by 75%.

effect_by_rank.1: You have a 50% lower chance to gain or lose mutations from radiation.
effect_by_rank.2: You will never gain or lose mutations from radiation.

effect_by_rank.1: Below 20% Health, gain 20 Damage Resist, +10% damage and +15% AP regen.
effect_by_rank.2: Below 20% Health, gain 30 Damage Resist, +15% damage and +15% AP regen.
effect_by_rank.3: Below 20% Health, gain 40 Damage Resist, +20% damage and +15% AP regen.

effect_by_rank.1: Absorb 10% of rads taken and restore Hunger and Thirst.
effect_by_rank.2: Absorb 20% of rads taken and restore Hunger and Thirst.
Radiation regenerates more of your health.
effect_by_rank.3: Radiation regenerates significantly more of your health.
